# packages.txt — generated by pmsync, do not edit by hand
#
# To exclude a package from replication:
#   add it to packages.exclude  (experiments, orphans)
#   add it to packages.local    (machine-specific installs)
#
# Regenerate:
#   pmsync
# =============================================================
